overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a character walking through a dark, misty swamp at night. The player approaches a wooden stilt house, passes underneath it, and continues along the water's edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: open swamp grassland with scattered cypress trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall swamp grass toward a wooden stilt house visible in the distance

entered.detail: elevated wooden shack on stilts over water, visible in the distance
tall trees with spanish moss hanging from branches
greyish moss hanging from tree branches
tall green grass covering the ground
faint orange lights visible through the trees in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking through dense swamp grass at night. A wooden stilt house is visible in the distance to the right, while cypress trees with hanging spanish moss frame the path ahead. The atmosphere is dark and moody with distant lights flickering through the trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to wooden stilt house over water

events.description: ground surface transitions from grass to dirt path as approaching the stilt house structure

agents.ego_description: approaching the wooden stilt house, navigating from grassy terrain onto a dirt path leading under the structure

entered.detail: thick wooden support pillars holding up the house structure
dark water visible beneath the elevated house

segments.scene_description: The player moves closer to the wooden stilt house, leaving the tall grass behind for a dirt path. The wooden support stilts become prominent as the camera approaches the dark area underneath the structure, with water visible beneath the house.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered area underneath wooden stilt house over water

events.description: lighting becomes significantly darker and more enclosed when moving under the stilt house
game UI prompt appears to pick up Common Bulrush from the water

agents.ego_description: passing underneath the stilt house through the dark enclosed space, navigating between wooden support beams above the water

entered.detail: thick horizontal and vertical wooden beams supporting the house floor
low-lying fog hovering over the water surface under the house

segments.scene_description: The player enters the dark, enclosed space beneath the stilt house where the sky is completely blocked. Wooden support beams frame the view as mist rises from the water below. A game prompt appears indicating an item can be picked up from the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: swamp water's edge with cypress trees

events.description: exiting from under the stilt house back to open swamp along the water's edge

agents.ego_description: walking along the water's edge away from the stilt house, returning to the open swamp

entered.detail: expansive swamp water body reflecting the dark sky

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the stilt house, the scene opens back up to the swamp with open water on the right and cypress trees ahead. The player continues walking along the water's edge as the wooden structure recedes behind, with distant lights once again visible through the trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dark, moody swamp that leads from open wetlands into the claustrophobic underside of a stilt house before returning to the water's edge. It begins by wading through dense swamp grass and cypress trees draped in Spanish moss, moving toward a distant wooden structure as flickering lights pierce the night. As the camera leaves the tall grass for a dirt path, the view shifts toward the massive wooden support stilts and the dark water beneath the house. The scene then closes in as the camera enters the enclosed space under the structure, where the sky is blocked by beams and mist rises from the water around a collectible item. Finally, the camera emerges from the shadows back into the open swamp, continuing along the shoreline as the wooden house recedes and the distant lights reappear through the trees.
